item.title: Android Backdoor Pre-Installed On Devices — Thousands Already Infected
item.description: Kaspersky Threat Intelligence has confirmed that a fully functional malware backdoor is being distributed pre-installed on Android devices.

item.title: ‘ARC Raiders’ Confirms Its Coin Dupe Exploit Use Punishments
item.description: If you used the coin dupe exploit in ARC Raiders, you are about to be punished in some form or another by Embark. Here's how.

item.title: Supply Chain Emissions Are No Longer Someone Else’s Problem
item.description: Corporate buyers are pushing emissions reporting onto suppliers, turning carbon data from a nice-to-have into a cost of doing business.

item.title: Meta Quest Owners To Get An Immersion Upgrade But It Won’t Come Cheap
item.description: Just weeks after it went public, Virtuix has joined the Made for Meta program to dramatically increase its addressable audience to include Meta Quest ...

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Wednesday, February 18
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.
